subcodes.first_line: O thou who holdest fast to the Covenant! Today the world of existence is illumined by the light of the Covenant; its radiance hath encompassed the world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای متمسک بمیثاق امروز عالم امکان بنور میثاق روشن است پرتوش جهانگیر است و
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @light and darkness, @firmness in the Covenant, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant
